testcases.name: pcie_cfg_wr_rd_test
testcases.title: PCIe config registers default and masked read/write verification
testcases.description: Verifies default reset values and masked read/write behavior for PCIe configuration space registers.
steps: Read each register in addr_array and compare with default_value_array using read_mask_array.
Record a failure if any default value mismatches.
Iterate write patterns 0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0xFFFFFFFF, 0x00000000.
For each pattern, write to each register where write_mask_array != 0 and not skipped.
Read back each register where read_mask_array != 0 and compare against expected masked value.
Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise fail.
testcases.expected_result: Test passes when finish(0) is called: all default reads match defaults and all readbacks equal ((data_wr & write_mask) | (~write_mask & default)). Failures print CFG_RST_FAIL or CFG_WR_FAIL and call finish(1).

testcases.name: pcie_dbi_dsp_reg_wr_rd_test
testcases.title: PCIe DBI DSP register read/write verification
testcases.description: Checks default values and verifies direct read/write integrity for DSP DBI registers.
steps: Read each DSP register in addr_array and compare with default_value_array.
Record a failure if any default value mismatches.
Iterate write patterns 0xAAAAAAAA, 0x55555555, 0x00000000.
Write pattern to each DSP register.
Read back each register and compare to the written value.
Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise fail.
testcases.expected_result: All readbacks equal the last written pattern; failures print DSP_RST_FAIL or DSP_WR_FAIL. finish(0) on success, finish(1) on failure.

testcases.name: pcie_dbi_usp_reg_wr_rd_test
testcases.title: PCIe DBI USP GPR register read/write verification
testcases.description: Verifies default values and fixed-pattern read/write integrity for USP general purpose registers.
steps: Read each USP register in addr_array and compare with default_value_array.
Record a failure if any default value mismatches.
Write fixed pattern 0xA5A5A5A5 to each register.
Read back each register and compare to 0xA5A5A5A5.
Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise fail.
testcases.expected_result: All readbacks equal 0xA5A5A5A5; finish(0) on success, finish(1) on failure.

testcases.name: pcie_sii_rc_reg_wr_rd_test
testcases.title: PCIe SII RC inbound register read/write verification
testcases.description: Verifies default values and read/write behavior for SII RC inbound address mapping registers.
steps: Read each SII RC register in addr_array and compare with default_value_array.
Record a failure if any default value mismatches.
Iterate write patterns 0xFFFFFFFF and 0x00000000.
Write pattern to each register.
Read back each register and compare to the written value.
Pass if def_fail_cnt == 0 and wr_fail_cnt == 0; otherwise fail.
testcases.expected_result: All readbacks equal the written pattern; finish(0) on success, finish(1) on failure.
